## Highlights

- The log directory setting now sits with the log level setting, keeping related diagnostics controls together.

---

**Notice:**
If the application crashes on an older CPU during transcription, use the Microsoft Store build when a matching Store release is available for this version: https://github.com/MaxITService/AIVORelay/releases/tag/v1.0.19-store
